---
title: The title of your Semesterproject
---

```{r preprocessing}
#| code-summary: preprocessing

``` 

{{< include chapters/_proposal2.qmd >}}
{{< include chapters/_abstract.qmd >}}
{{< include chapters/_introduction.qmd >}}
{{< include chapters/_methods.qmd >}}
{{< include chapters/_results.qmd >}}
{{< include chapters/_discussion.qmd >}}
{{< include chapters/_appendix.qmd >}}

### Wordcount

<!-- after installing the wordcountadding, remove the line "#| eval: false" -->

```{r}
#| eval: false
wordcountaddin::word_count("index.qmd")
```
